es.name: Valor Actual de Anualidad
es.description: Calcula el valor presente de una serie de pagos futuros iguales.
es.seo_description: Calcula el valor presente de una serie de pagos futuros iguales. Calculadora gratuita, precisa e instantánea. Obten resultados al instante con.
es.example_label: Calculating present value of receiving $1,000 annually for 15 years at 5% discount rate.
es.result_context: The pv of {pv} is what those future payments are worth in today's dollars.
mistakes: Using wrong discount rate that doesn't reflect opportunity cost
Not adjusting for payment timing (beginning vs end of period)
Ignoring tax implications on annuity income
